detaileddescription.para: This compatibility shim initializes the default PDJE file logger backend. Host applications loading multiple DSOs should prefer pdje_logging_init_v1 during startup and pdje_logging_shutdown_v1 during shutdown/unload.

briefdescription.para: Shuts down the PDJE logging runtime.

detaileddescription.para: Host applications using reloadable plugin flows should call this explicitly before unloading the owning module.
